title: Microsoft's AI Boss Says White-Collar Jobs Are Gone in 18 Months
script: Microsoft's CEO of AI just drew an 18-month deadline for white-collar work. Mustafa Suleyman told the Financial Times that virtually all professional tasks — accounting, legal work, marketing, project management — will be done by AI within 12 to 18 months. He called it 'human-level performance on most professional tasks.' Microsoft is betting $190 billion on this being true. Over 100,000 tech workers have already been laid off in 2026. The clock is ticking.
